# Unmapped Concepts

The Unmapped Concepts module evaluates the distribution of unmapped
values in a cohort, looking both at the proportion of unmapped values
for a given variable and at the median number of unmapped rows per
patient in the cohort.

## Installation

You can install the development version of this package like so:

``` r
devtools::install_github('ssdqa/unmappedconcepts')
```

# Package index

## Module Execution

- [`uc_process()`](https://ssdqa.github.io/unmappedconcepts/reference/uc_process.md)
  : Unmapped Concepts
- [`uc_output()`](https://ssdqa.github.io/unmappedconcepts/reference/uc_output.md)
  : Unmapped Concepts – Output Generation

## Sample Input

- [`uc_input_file_omop`](https://ssdqa.github.io/unmappedconcepts/reference/uc_input_file_omop.md)
  : UC Sample Input File – OMOP
- [`uc_input_file_pcornet`](https://ssdqa.github.io/unmappedconcepts/reference/uc_input_file_pcornet.md)
  : UC Sample Input File – PCORnet
